title: Top College for M.A Economics in Noida & Delhi NCR | Galgotias University
content: The MA in Economics is a terminal master’s program that equips its graduates with the advanced knowledge and quantitative skills required for an economic analyst in the business world, the consulting industry, a central bank or government. The training provides a thorough understanding of fundamental economic principles, application of mathematical methods and modeling, and the use of computer software for large-scale data analysis. It is accomplished through the economics core and elective courses. The course will give foundational knowledge of both pure and applied economics, with a focus on qualitative and quantitative economics. It put an emphasis on understanding and applying economics through experiential learning and hands-on activities, apart from classroom learning. The objective is to help the economics student strengthen domain knowledge and to hone applied skills that are needed in the real-world workplace. The course provides practical exposure in terms of research and field practice and the weightage is more than 22%. Bachelor Degree with minimum 50% marks or equivalent. Students having CUET Score will be given preference in merit 01 Develop analytical mind for the learning of theoretical and empirical bases of economics as a field of study 02 Extending the empirical and philosophical issues to economic thoughts and practices 03 Develop critical thinking and analysis of significant economic issues 04 Creating a bridge between theoretical constructs and practices 05 Facilitate the pragmatic between school of thoughts and their impact on policies 06 Using quantitative analysis and make a preview of their impact on economic policies 07 Enhancing quality of life of people and their welfare 08 Train the minds for futuristic research and development 09 Develop a holistic world view for economic planning and integration 10 Ability to relate recent economic development in the reforming and post-truth era 01 Graduates will be equipped to pursue higher education, Teaching, Research and competitive examinations like Indian Economic Services and Civil Services etc. 02 Post graduates will drive entrepreneurship initiatives and start-ups in the fields related to Economics and Finance. 03 Graduates will be able to serve Public, Private and NGOs to achieve personal enrichment and professional goals. 01 Instigate, Formulate, Estimate and Implement Economic issues with the help of Quantitative Economic analysis through SPSS etc. 02 Identify, Comprehend, and Analyse the issues related to International Trade and Finance and related intermediaries like institutions and market etc. 03 Investigate, Apprehend and visualise the impact of Economic and Natural Activities on Environment, Climate Change and Economic Sustainability. 04 Understand, Scrutinize and Address Developmental Issues in Economics related to Health, Education, Human Development, Gender, and Integration among Economies.
